name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability for students, admins, or the CV builder.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["feature", "needs-review"]
assignees: []
---

## Goal

<!-- One sentence. What are we enabling and why? -->

## User Story

> As a **[student / admin]**, I want to **[capability]** so that I can **[outcome]**.

<!-- Concrete, testable statements. If a criterion can't be tested, rewrite it. -->

## Screenshots / References

<!--
  Design mockups, competitor examples, existing screens to model after.
  Drag images inline or link to Figma / Notion / Miro.

## Testing Notes

<!--
  How will a reviewer verify this works? Which wizard step? Which
  templates? Which admin page? Any specific student profile to try
  it against?
-->

- [ ] Fresh student registration.
- [ ] Partial-profile student (only Basics + Education filled).
- [ ] Student with a photo uploaded.
- [ ] Mobile view (Chrome DevTools, 375px).
- [ ] Admin panel reflects any new signal or funnel step.

## Risk Areas

<!--
  What could this break? Which existing flows should we stress-test
  before shipping? Think about the CV creation journey, exports,
  admin metrics, and email links.
-->

## Out of Scope

<!--
  Optional. What are we NOT doing in this issue? Reduces scope creep
  during review.
-->

  Optional. Blocked by another issue? Requires a schema change that
